pageDescription: Schedule and moderate community cleanup events.
readOnlyHint: Your role can view events; only admins can create or edit cleanup events.

form.title: Title
form.recurrenceHint: Stored on this event for reference; admin create does not expand a series in the database.
form.endDateHint: Must be on the same calendar day as the start, by 23:59 at the latest.
form.createAsPending: Create as pending (simulate user submission, requires approval)

approve.partialMessage: {processed} succeeded, {failed} failed. Review remaining rows and try again.
approve.failedMessage: None of the selected events could be updated ({failed} failed).
approve.errorMessage: Try again or approve events individually.

decline.partialMessage: {processed} succeeded, {failed} failed. Review remaining rows and try again.
decline.failedMessage: None of the selected events could be updated ({failed} failed).
decline.errorMessage: Try again or decline events individually.

bulk.selectedMeta: {count} selected · SSE refreshes this list automatically
bulk.declineSelectedDescription: This reason applies to all {count} selected event(s) (minimum 3 characters).
bulk.approveConfirmDescription: Approve moderation for {count} selected pending event(s)?

decline.title: Decline event
decline.description: Provide a short reason for declining. This is stored for audit purposes (3 to 2000 characters).

scheduleConflict.title: Schedule conflict
scheduleConflict.description: {title} is already scheduled for {datetime}. Adjust the time or open the existing event.
scheduleConflict.overlapHint: Another event may overlap this time at this site: {title} ({datetime}).
scheduleConflict.previewFailed: Could not verify schedule conflicts. Try again or save with caution.
scheduleConflict.overrideLabel: I reviewed the overlap and want to save anyway.

create.hint: Create a cleanup event for site {siteId}.

detail.moderationResolvedHint: This event has been moderated. You can return it to pending for re-review if needed.
detail.moderationResolvedReadOnly: Moderation is complete. Only admins can change the decision.
detail.returnToPendingMessage: The event is back in the moderation queue.
detail.returnToPendingConfirmDescription: The organizer will be notified that the event needs review again. Previous approval or decline metadata will be cleared.
detail.noteAddedMessage: Your note was added to this event.
detail.removeParticipantDescription: Remove {name} from this event? Their join record will be deleted.
detail.participantRemovedMessage: The participant was removed from this event.
detail.noRiskSignals: No check-in risk signals for this event.
detail.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Save before leaving this page.
detail.unsavedChangesActionBlocked: Save or discard your edits before approving, declining, or marking complete.
detail.scheduleConflictBlockedMessage: Resolve the overlapping event or check the override box before saving.
detail.readOnlyBanner: You are viewing this event with read-only access. Creating or editing cleanup events requires an admin role.
detail.moderationPendingHint: This event was created by a user and awaits your review. Approve to make it visible to participants, or decline to reject it.
detail.moderationPendingReadOnly: This event is pending approval. Only an admin can approve or decline it.
detail.moderationHintPending: You can also edit details before approving.
detail.moderationHintEdit: Edit event details. Changes are saved when you click Save.
detail.recurrenceClearHint: Clear the field and save to remove recurrence metadata.
detail.completedDateHint: You can adjust when the event was completed.
detail.afterPhotosHint: Evidence uploaded by the organizer after the cleanup was completed.
detail.analyticsHint: Cumulative join series may be truncated for very large events; hourly check-ins use UTC buckets.
detail.name: Name
detail.cancelConfirmDescription: Participants will see this cleanup as cancelled. This action is visible in the audit log.
detail.eventApprovedMessage: The event is now visible to users.

riskSignals.intro: Signals from attendee check-in (for example redeem location far from the event site). Use resolve or dismiss when reviewed; active rows expire automatically after 90 days.
riskSignals.empty: No check-in risk signals match this filter.

toast.updatedMessage: The check-in risk signal was updated.
